key.name: toggle-shortcut
key.description: Keyboard shortcut used to toggle the desktop ASCII overlay.

key.name: cycle-preset-shortcut
key.description: Keyboard shortcut used to cycle the prototype grid preset.

key.name: capture-probe-shortcut
key.description: Temporary keyboard shortcut used to test whether GNOME Shell can capture a desktop frame from inside the extension.

key.name: overlay-enabled
key.description: Whether the ASCII overlay should be active.

key.name: cell-size
key.description: Prototype grid cell size in screen pixels.

key.name: background-opacity
key.description: Opacity of the dark background wash behind the prototype grid.

key.name: amber-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for the amber prototype grid and cell highlights.
